hook.summary: A cinematic sci-fi invasion of a futuristic city.
hook.visual_action: A massive purple portal opens in a dark sky above a futuristic cityscape, releasing a fleet of enemy ships.
hook.text_overlay: Warning! Warning! Enemy forces have invaded
hook.voiceover_transcript: Warning! Warning! Enemy forces have invaded.

scene_flow: Cinematic 3D render of a futuristic city being invaded by ships from a purple sky portal.
Transition to a high-tech air defense array activating with red and blue laser beams.
Top-down gameplay footage showing defensive units and 'Guard Protocol' in action against waves of enemies.
A countdown timer screen indicating the time remaining until the next invasion.
Final end card featuring cinematic artwork of fighter jets and a call to download.
on_screen_text: THE BATTLE FOR SURVIVAL HAS BEGUN
Content in this ad unlocks at a specific level
audience_proxy: Male gamers 18-35 who enjoy sci-fi aesthetics and strategic combat or tower defense games.
